title: mentha fissidens
intro: Mentha fissidens, also known as Indian pennyroyal or Mosquito plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been shown to possess antimicrobial, antifungal, and insect-repelling properties. The health benefits of Mentha fissidens include its ability to aid digestion, alleviate menstrual cramps, and reduce stress, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. Mentha fissidens is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oil blends, often used to repel mosquitoes and other insects.
